title: I want to spin
description: The mod adds to Minecraft features inspired by the famous "spinbot" and Bhop from CS2.
body: The mod The mod adds to Minecraft features inspired by the famous "spinbot" and Bhop from CS2. The default key for controlling the Spin function is R. The key to increase the rotation speed is +, and the key to decrease it is -. The Bhop key is B. This mod works only on the client side and will not affect other players' gaming experience. It merely allows you to keep spinning and jumping in front of other players, with no functions that harm the server's gameplay.
